summary: This is a comprehensive welder selection chart designed to guide users through choosing the appropriate welding equipment and process. The chart is organized in six numbered steps covering wall level assessment, welding position, material type and thickness, material gauge ranges, typical applications, and welding process selection. It provides quick reference criteria for selecting between flux-core/FCAW, MIG/GMAW, stick/SMAW, and TIG/GTAW processes, with a quick guide example showing how to determine duty cycle based on amperage and usage patterns.

figures.caption: Six-step welder selection decision matrix covering wall level, position, material type, gauge range, applications, and welding process with duty cycle quick guide example
